words.def: a river in southern Scotland that flows eastward to the Firth of Forth
words.zh: adv. 往前, 以後, 向外

words.def: a fortified military post where troops are stationed
words.zh: n. 堡壘, 要塞, 易貨站

words.def: used of physical heat; having a high or higher than desirable temperature or giving off heat or feeling or causing a sensation of heat or burning
words.zh: a. 熱的, 熱心的, 辣的, 熱情的, 激動的, 猛烈的, 緊迫的

words.def: a state of decay usually accompanied by an offensive odor
words.zh: n. 腐爛, 腐蝕, 敗壞
